docket_entries.description: TRIAL RESET TO DEC-17-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506 TRIAL OF OCT-22-2018 IS TAKEN OFF CALENDAR
DECLARATION OF USING SC-150 FORM USED FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLBROOK, ALICE
REMARK: RETURNED MAIL: NOTICE OF ENTRY OF JUDGMENT MAILED TO DEFENDANT ON 12-18-19. PER U.S. POSTAL SERVICE, "RETURN TO SENDER - NOT DELIVERABLE AS ADDRESSED - UNABLE TO FORWARD."
ABSTRACT OF JUDGMENT FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLBROOK, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENCINAS, IRMA
COPYING FEES (2 PAGE) COPY OF SC-104 PAID BY PLAINTIFF HOLBROOK, ALICE
NOTICE OF CHANGE OF ADDRESS FILED BY PLAINTIFF HOLBROOK, ALICE
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $7,500.00 FILED BY HOLBROOK, ALICE AS TO DEFENDANT ENCINAS, IRMA ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR OCT-22-2018 AT 03:30 PM IN DEPT 506
COPYING FEES (1 PAGE, 1 CERTIFIED COPY) PAID BY PLAINTIFF HOLBROOK, ALICE

SMALL CLAIMS CALENDAR OF DEC-17-2018 - TAKEN UNDER SUBMISSION AS OF DEC-17-2018 BY CHRISTINE VAN AKEN. APPEARANCE BY PLAINTIFF ALICE HOLBROOK. DEFENDANT IRMA ENCINAS DID NOT APPEAR. PLAINTIFF EXHIBITS RETAINED. JUDGE: CHRISTINE VAN AKEN; CLERK: R. SAHATJIAN; NOT REPORTED. (506)
SMALL CLAIMS HEARING OF DEC-17-2018 - JUDGMENT.
EXHIBITS RETURNED TO PLAINTIFF HOLBROOK, ALICE
PROOF OF SERVICE FILED ON CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FEE FOR SERVICE: $10.00 SERVED OCT-31-2018, SUBSTITUTE SERVICE ON NATURAL PERSON AS TO DEFENDANT ENCINAS, IRMA

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF HOLBROOK, ALICE RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT ENCINAS, IRMA $7,500.00 PRINCIPAL, $85.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $7,585.00, DEFENDANT SHALL PLAY PLAINTIFF: $3101.99 FOR SECURITY DEPOSIT AND $4398.01 STATUTORY DAMAGES FOR LANDLORD BAD FAITH PURSUANT TO CIV. CODE 1950.5(L). I AM PERSUADED THAT DEFENDANT FALSIFIED THE INVOICE FROM FINE CUSTOM PAINTING INC. STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS PLAINTIFF'S EXHIBITS RECEIVED
